subtitle: Marie absent until 15 June; Ivanti security incident and DTP1092 need attention
context: Marie Cooksey is out of office until Monday 15 June and has sent a handover note covering H&S support, OSM escalations, and DSE system updates. James Salas Guillen is on annual leave from end of today until Thursday 18 June, with handover provided for PeopleXD data uploads and Cority test server work. The DTP1092 College staff in PXD project has active comments from Marie awaiting your response, and Crispin Muncaster needs to reschedule this week's meeting. A Priority 1 Ivanti security vulnerability incident is active with Emma Fitz-Gibbon coordinating Sarah Warne's involvement of Rob and Asta Palmer for PeopleXD service request testing. Access Support case 68974493 requires Chemistry bulk-delete authorization before Access Group can proceed. The Strategic H&S Modular System evaluation weightings must be submitted to Helen Harbour within the next few days. Open the Ivanti security incident email from Emma Fitz-Gibbon first, then Marie's handover note.

urgent.title: Ivanti Security Vulnerability - Priority 1
urgent.sub: Emma Fitz-Gibbon coordinating with Sarah Warne to brief you and others on next steps for testing PeopleXD service requests with Asta Palmer and Rob.
urgent.subject: RE: Major Incident - Priority 1 Support Call# TBC - a Security vulnerability with Ivanti.

urgent.title: Access case 68974493 - Chemistry bulk-delete authorization
urgent.sub: Access Group ready to proceed but needs your approval before they can action the Chemistry bulk-delete request. Julie Hickman chased on 8 June.
urgent.subject: Re: Access Support Team | 68974493 - New Case

needs.sub: Helen Harbour running review of proposed evaluation weightings. Submit your input before end of week. Key decision point for SHSMS procurement.
needs.subject: Strategic H&S Modular System requirements evaluation weightings
